prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. I renamed GetUser to FetchUser and GetUsers to FetchUsers across the codebase.

assertions.text: All 3 changed files are in the single commit
Commit message mentions the rename (contains 'rename', 'Fetch', or 'Get')
assertions.check: grep for rename-related terms in commit message

assertions.text: No commit message references 'anthropic', 'claude', or 'AI assistant'
assertions.check: grep -i for forbidden terms in commit messages
